reasoning: Wicked: For Good must have the single highest 3-day domestic opening weekend of any movie in 2025 to resolve YES. Historically, musicals heavily rely on long box office legs rather than explosive front-loaded opening weekends, in contrast to massive superhero or sci-fi releases. The 2025 slate is highly competitive, including potential colossal opening weekends from 'Jurassic World: Rebirth', 'Superman', 'Fantastic Four: First Steps', and 'Avatar: Fire and Ash'. While Wicked Part 2 could be a huge hit, the probability that its opening weekend will surpass every single front-loaded action and superhero blockbuster next year is extremely low. Even a Barbie-like breakthrough makes it just a contender among many heavy hitters, resulting in a prediction on the very low end of the spectrum.
